title: dolichos hastiformis
intro: Dolichos hastiformis, a perennial climber native to tropical Asia, is a type of legume that belongs to the pea family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dolichos hastiformis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in the form of powder and tincture to treat various ailments.
